summary: FASE 3 end-to-end testing complete — Description & Image per-variant fully functional. All backend APIs (POST/PATCH/GET /api/products) accept and persist description field. POS ProductQuickView displays description and switches image+description when changing variants. Admin form loads/saves description and image correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/products accepts 'description' field and persists it
Backend: PATCH /api/products/{id} accepts 'description' and 'image' fields and persists them (round-trip verified)
Backend: GET /api/products returns 'description' for all products
Backend: Batik template (tpl_batik_mega) has 3 variants with 3 DISTINCT image URLs (seed data verified)
Frontend POS: ProductQuickView opens for multi-variant product (Batik Mega Mendung)
Frontend POS: Description block visible with data-testid='quickview-description'
Frontend POS: Switching variants (Biru-Coklat → Hijau-Emas) changes SKU (BTK-MEGA-001 → BTK-MEGA-003)
Frontend POS: Switching variants changes image URL (distinct Unsplash URLs per variant)
Frontend POS: Switching variants changes description text (warna Biru-Coklat → warna Hijau-Emas)
Frontend Admin: Edit button (admin-edit-products-{id}-button) opens form and loads product values
Frontend Admin: Form has image URL input (admin-product-image-input) with live preview (admin-product-image-preview)
Frontend Admin: Form has description textarea (admin-product-description-input) loaded with product description
Frontend Admin: Form has base_unit dropdown (admin-product-base_unit-input)
Frontend Admin: Editing description and clicking Update (admin-create-product-button) saves without error
